summary.en: An organization-alignment framework for checking whether strategy, structure, systems, shared values, style, staff, and skills reinforce each other enough for strategy execution.
summary.zh: 一套组织一致性分析框架，用于检查战略、结构、系统、共同价值观、风格、人员和技能是否相互支撑，从而让战略能够落地。

sources.label: McKinsey & Company · Enduring Ideas: The 7-S Framework · 2008
Thomas J. Peters & Robert H. Waterman Jr. · In Search of Excellence · 1982

references.label: McKinsey & Company · Enduring Ideas: The 7-S Framework

note.en: McKinsey source for the 7-S organization-alignment lens.
note.zh: 7S 组织一致性视角的麦肯锡来源。
